title: Udupi Sri Krishna Matha
tagline: Udupi Sri Krishna Matha — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Udupi Shri Krishna Temple is a well-known historic Hindu temple dedicated to Krishna and Dvaita Matha, located in the city of Udupi in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Udupi Shri Krishna Temple is a well-known historic Hindu temple dedicated to Krishna and Dvaita Matha, located in the city of Udupi in Karnataka, India. The Matha area resembles a living ashram, a holy place for daily devotion and living. Surrounding the Shri Krishna Temple are several temples namely the Udupi Anantheshwara Temple which is over a thousand years old.

topPlaces.name: Udupi taluk
topPlaces.description: Udupi taluk is a taluk in the Udupi District of the Indian state of Karnataka. The headquarters is the town of Udupi.

topPlaces.name: Udupi
topPlaces.description: Udupi (Kannada: [uɖupi]) is a city in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is the administrative headquarters of Udupi district, and one of the fastest-growing cities in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Saarvajanika Nagabrahmastana Moodanidambooru, Bannanje
topPlaces.description: Saarvajanika Naga Brahmastana (Kannada/Tulu:ಸಾರ್ವಜನಿಕ ನಾಗ ಬ್ರಹ್ಮಸ್ಥಾನ) is an ancient Hindu temple, situated at Moodanidambooru (Bannanje) village of Udupi district in Karnataka. It is one of the oldest Nagabana in Udupi for snake worship.

topPlaces.name: Kuthpady
topPlaces.description: Kuthpady is a village in the Udupi District in the state of Karnataka on the west coast of India. Kuthpady is located 4.5 km from the town of Udupi, around 11 km from Manipal, around 10 km from Malpe Port and beach.

topPlaces.name: Udyavara
topPlaces.description: Udyavara is an ancient port village located 5 km south of Udupi in the Indian state of Karnataka. This town is a regional marine industry and fisheries hub.

topPlaces.name: Kukkikatte
topPlaces.description: Kukkikatte is a place located about 3 km from the city of Udupi in the state of Karnataka, India. It is a suburb of the Udupi City.

topPlaces.name: Bankerkatta
topPlaces.description: Bankerkatta is a small village in Udupi district, Karnataka, India. It falls under Kidiyoor Gram Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kodavoor
topPlaces.description: Kodavooru is a small town belonging to the temple city of Udupi in Karnataka, India. Home to Lord Shankaranarayana Temple and many other small sacred Hindu temples, it has a long history of its own.

items.note: Udupi taluk is a taluk in the Udupi District of the Indian state of Karnataka. The headquarters is the town of Udupi.
Udupi (Kannada: [uɖupi]) is a city in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is the administrative headquarters of Udupi district, and one of the fastest-growing cities in Karnataka.

Saarvajanika Naga Brahmastana (Kannada/Tulu:ಸಾರ್ವಜನಿಕ ನಾಗ ಬ್ರಹ್ಮಸ್ಥಾನ) is an ancient Hindu temple, situated at Moodanidambooru (Bannanje) village of Udupi district in Karnataka. It is one of the oldest Nagabana in Udupi for snake worship.

Kuthpady is a village in the Udupi District in the state of Karnataka on the west coast of India. Kuthpady is located 4.5 km from the town of Udupi, around 11 km from Manipal, around 10 km from Malpe Port and beach.
Udyavara is an ancient port village located 5 km south of Udupi in the Indian state of Karnataka. This town is a regional marine industry and fisheries hub.
Kukkikatte is a place located about 3 km from the city of Udupi in the state of Karnataka, India. It is a suburb of the Udupi City.
Bankerkatta is a small village in Udupi district, Karnataka, India. It falls under Kidiyoor Gram Panchayat.
Kodavooru is a small town belonging to the temple city of Udupi in Karnataka, India. Home to Lord Shankaranarayana Temple and many other small sacred Hindu temples, it has a long history of its own.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Udupi Sri Krishna Matha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Udupi Sri Krishna Matha is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Udupi Sri Krishna Matha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Udupi Sri Krishna Matha?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Udupi Sri Krishna Matha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Udupi Sri Krishna Matha?
faq.a: Stays in Udupi Sri Krishna Matha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Udupi Sri Krishna Matha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Udupi taluk, Udupi, Saarvajanika Nagabrahmastana Moodanidambooru, Bannanje, Kuthpady, Udyavara.
